steps.title: Convert to years after 1998
steps.content: Let $t$ be years after $1998$. Then $1998$ is $t=0$, $2018$ is $t=20$, and $2022$ is $t=24$. The known points for the linear model are $(0,47)$ and $(20,231)$, where $y$ is in thousands.

steps.title: Use the fitted line to predict 2022
steps.content:
Use the two known points $(0,47)$ and $(20,231)$:
$$m=\frac{231-47}{20-0}=\frac{184}{20}=9.2.$$ Since $t=0$ gives $y=47$, the model is $$y=9.2t+47.$$ For $2022$, $t=24$: $$y=9.2(24)+47=267.8.$$ Rounded to the nearest whole number, this is $268$ thousand.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The value $267.8$ rounds to $268$, so the answer is 268.
